title: Madras High Court issues notice to Udhayanidhi Stalin on plea alleging discrepancies in poll affidavit
description: The Madras High Court on Tuesday issued notice to Tamil Nadu Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin, the Central government and thje Income Tax authorities on a plea alleging discrepancies in the election affidavit filed by him [R Kumaravelu Vs Director General of Income Tax].A Bench comprising Chief Justice SA Dharmadhikari and Justice G Arul Murugan directed the Director General of Income Tax (Investigation) and the Union Ministry of Corporate Affairs, to place a report on record by Monday,
